name: clawket
description: Structured task contracts for LLM coding agents — Claude Code plugin with local SQLite-backed task board + MCP RAG pull across sessions

skillsList.name: clawket
skillsList.description: Manage work dashboard — view/update tasks, plans, units, cycles. Use when you need to check current work status, update task progress, create new tasks, or manage project workflow.

skillsList.name: pdd
skillsList.description: PDD Plan + Unit 사전 예비 설계 — Done 명제, Unit 분해, 의존성 그래프, 수렴 조건 박기. 발견-수렴 루프의 Phase 1 진입점. Use when starting a new product plan or decomposing scenarios into units.

skillsList.name: scenario-author
skillsList.description: Atomic 사용자 시나리오 작성 — Given/When/Then 형식 강제, 도메인별 artifact 산출. 발견-수렴 루프의 Phase 0 진입점. Use when authoring user scenarios for a new domain or menu area.

skillsList.name: qa-batch
skillsList.description: Sub-agent batch dispatch + TSV evidence emit + bulk sync transcription. 9000-태스크 자율 런 검증 패턴 캡슐화. PDD A8 운영 인터페이스. Use when running QA round dispatches with sub-agents.

skillsList.name: discover-loop
skillsList.description: 발견-수렴 루프 메인 엔진 — Round R sub-agent dispatch + 3-way 수렴 판정 + 다음 라운드 schedule. Use when running the main discovery-convergence loop autonomously.

skillsList.name: scenario-refine
skillsList.description: scenario_error 처리 — atomic 분해 / 의도 재정의 / 삭제 3-way 분기. cancelled QA task comment + audit artifact 동시 기록. Use when QA flags scenario_error during a round.

skillsList.name: qa-fix
skillsList.description: QA defect → fix task 처리 — 결함 해결 plan 의 Round R unit 에 fix task 등록 + 코드 수정. Use when QA finds defects that need code fixes in the next round.

commands.name: /pdd-plan
commands.description: Create PDD Plan + Unit 사전 예비 설계.

commands.name: /scenario-author
commands.description: Author atomic user scenarios for a domain.

commands.name: /qa-batch
commands.description: Run a QA round via sub-agent batch dispatch.

commands.name: /scenario-refine
commands.description: Refine scenario_error via atomic decomposition / intent redefinition / deletion.

commands.name: /qa-fix
commands.description: Register fix tasks for QA defects.

commands.name: /pdd-promote
commands.description: Confirm-prompt flow for promoting an EXPERIMENTAL skill RULE.md to STABLE plus optional cleanup of user-scope ~/.claude/skills/{pdd-plan,scenario-author,qa-batch,discover-loop,scenario-refine}/ + stub replacement of ~/.claude/rules/{pdd,scenario-authoring,qa-flow}.md (manual gate; requires explicit user confirmation).
